subject: Fermi  trigger No 733366352: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240329.04 (trigger No 733366352,00h 01m 24.00s , -16d 09m 00.0s, R=26.22) errorbox  59181 sec after notice time and 59213 sec after trigger time at 2024-03-29 17:19:21 UT, with upper limit up to  24.5 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 80 deg. The sun  altitude  is -9.6 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -74 deg., longitude l = 76 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2409680

We obtain a following upper limits.
